summary: P0 Integration Endpoints Fix Verified - All backend APIs (Push Notifications, QuickBooks, System Settings) now return 200 instead of 404. Frontend Settings page with 5 tabs and Integrations UI fully functional. Inventory page loads at /inventory with single sidebar entry.
seed_data_creation: Test push subscriptions created with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 fix verified - app.include_router moved to line 8009 after all routes defined. All integration endpoints working.

backend_p0_fix.system_settings_get: PASS - /api/system/settings returns all AI/QuickBooks/Push settings fields
backend_p0_fix.system_settings_update: PASS - PUT /api/system/settings updates AI provider and model

frontend_settings_page.page_load: PASS - Settings page loads with title 'System Settings'
frontend_settings_page.tabs_count: PASS - 5 tabs present: General, Integrations, Pricing, Scheduling, Roles

frontend_settings_page.integrations_tab: PASS - Shows Google Maps, AI Features, QuickBooks, Push Notifications cards
frontend_settings_page.ai_features_card: PASS - Shows provider dropdown (Google Gemini) and model input (gemini-2.0-flash) when enabled
frontend_settings_page.push_notifications_card: PASS - Shows notification triggers (Chat, Job Assignment, Schedule, Payment)

frontend_inventory_page.sidebar_entry: PASS - Single 'Inventory' entry in sidebar (no duplicate 'Warehouse')
